title: The Reason for Hisham's Removal of Ashras from Khurasan and His Appointment of al-junayd
description: Khurdsan and His Appointment of al-Junayd According to 'Ali b. Muhammad-Abu al-Dhayyil: The reason for the dismissal of Ashras was that Shaddid b. Khilid al-Bihili went to Hisham to complain about him. Therefore, Hisham dismissed him, appointing al-Junayd b. 'Abd al-Rahman as governor of Khurisin in the year 111(730) 271 The reason for Hishim 's appointment of Junayd was that he had given a jeweled necklace to Umm Hakim bt. Yahyi b. alHakam, the wife of Hisham.272 It pleased Hishim; thus al-Junayd gave Hisham another necklace.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 25
